case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. JOVAN IRIGOYEN et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MERRILL, ANN K. SUBSTITUTED FOR STEBBINS, DONALD ROGERS AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IRIGOYEN, JOVAN $2,194.66 PRINCIPAL, $204.00 INTEREST, $245.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,643.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
